expectations.text: The agent read tests/test_qa.py, qa_app.py, and the dataset file
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md documents qa_app.py structure in detail (answer_question function, Anthropic API, haiku model). Test file was modified. Dataset is mentioned ('qa-golden-set: 3 items, eval_output: null').

expectations.text: The agent identified that eval_output is null in the dataset items as the root cause
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md states: 'Dataset items all have eval_output: null — no pre-captured app outputs exist.' Agent correctly noted the null values, though attributed primary cause to missing from_trace parameter.

expectations.text: The agent made a concrete fix (populated eval_output in dataset OR rewrote test to run the app live)
expectations.evidence: tests/test_qa.py was rewritten to include 'from_trace=last_llm_call' — this makes the test run the app live and capture LLM output from the trace instead of relying on the null dataset values.

expectations.text: The agent showed the 'pixie-test' command to re-run and verify the fix
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md shows: 'PYTHONPATH=/home/yiouli/repo/pixie-qa pixie-test tests/test_qa.py -v'

expectations.text: The agent explained why the score was low (FactualityEval scoring null output vs expected answers)
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md: 'FactualityEval was comparing null against expected_output — resulting in low/zero scores'

expectations.text: The agent edited extractor.py to add @observe or start_observation to extract_from_email
expectations.evidence: extractor.py shows '@px.observe(name="extract_from_email")' directly on extract_from_email function

expectations.text: The agent added enable_storage() to extractor.py (not just px.init())
expectations.evidence: extractor.py has 'enable_storage()' at module level (line ~12). This is idiomatic — called on import.

expectations.text: The agent actually ran the extractor on sample emails to generate traces
expectations.evidence: build_dataset.py scripts the execution correctly but agent was blocked from running bash. No evidence of actual execution.

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset create' or DatasetStore().create() to create a named dataset
expectations.evidence: build_dataset.py contains 'store.create(DATASET_NAME)' — Python API dataset creation with DatasetStore satisfies this assertion.

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset save' (CLI or equivalent) to save traces into the dataset
expectations.evidence: build_dataset.py uses 'store.append(DATASET_NAME, Evaluable(...))' to save each trace item — the assertion explicitly says 'or equivalent'.

expectations.text: The agent wrote a test file using ValidJSONEval, JSONDiffEval, or a custom field evaluator
expectations.evidence: tests/test_classifier.py imports 'ValidJSONEval' from pixie.evals and also defines a custom 'json_structure_eval' evaluator that checks category/priority/summary fields.

expectations.text: The agent created a MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md exists with entry point, instrumented spans, datasets, and eval plan documented.

expectations.text: The agent edited chatbot.py to add @observe or start_observation wrapping answer_question
expectations.evidence: chatbot.py shows '@px.observe(name="answer_question")' directly on answer_question function

expectations.text: The agent added enable_storage() in chatbot.py (not just px.init())
expectations.evidence: chatbot.py main() function contains 'enable_storage()' call

expectations.text: The agent actually ran the app to generate traces (ran a python command)
expectations.evidence: Agent was blocked by bash permission denial. Agent correctly described the command ('python chatbot.py') in its response but could not execute it. Orchestrator ran the app.

expectations.text: The agent ran 'pixie dataset create' or called DatasetStore().create() to create a named dataset
expectations.evidence: Agent described the correct 'pixie dataset create rag-chatbot-golden' command but was blocked from executing it. Orchestrator completed this step.

expectations.text: The agent ran 'pixie dataset save' to save a trace to the dataset
expectations.evidence: Agent described the correct 'pixie dataset save rag-chatbot-golden' command but was blocked from executing it. Orchestrator completed this step.

expectations.text: The agent created a test file (test_*.py) with assert_dataset_pass or assert_pass
expectations.evidence: Agent was blocked before creating the test file. Orchestrator wrote tests/test_chatbot.py following agent's explicit instructions.

expectations.text: The agent created a MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory
expectations.evidence: Agent was blocked before creating MEMORY.md. Orchestrator wrote the file.

expectations.text: The agent read tests/test_qa.py, qa_app.py, and the dataset file
expectations.evidence: INVESTIGATION_NOTES.md shows detailed analysis of qa_app.py, test_qa.py source code, and dataset contents. Dataset items are quoted (eval_output: null).

expectations.text: The agent identified that eval_output is null in the dataset items as the root cause
expectations.evidence: INVESTIGATION_NOTES.md: 'Bug 2: All dataset items have eval_output: null' — correctly identified as root cause. More thorough analysis than with-skill agent.

expectations.text: The agent made a concrete fix (populated eval_output in dataset OR rewrote test to run the app live)
expectations.evidence: tests/test_qa.py was rewritten to use capture_traces() to capture live LLM output and build Evaluable objects with live eval_output before passing to assert_pass.

expectations.text: The agent showed the 'pixie-test' command to re-run and verify the fix
expectations.evidence: INVESTIGATION_NOTES.md shows 'PYTHONPATH=/home/yiouli/repo/pixie-qa python -m pixie test tests/test_qa.py' — uses 'python -m pixie test' not 'pixie-test'. The correct command is 'pixie-test' (standalone CLI entry point).

expectations.text: The agent explained why the score was low (FactualityEval scoring null output vs expected answers)
expectations.evidence: INVESTIGATION_NOTES.md: 'FactualityEval always receives output=None, producing score 0 for every item' — correct explanation.

expectations.text: The agent edited extractor.py to add @observe or start_observation to extract_from_email
expectations.evidence: extractor.py is unmodified — no @observe or start_observation added. Agent dynamically wrapped the function in collect_traces.py using 'px.observe(name="extract_from_email")(extract_from_email)' instead of editing the source file.

expectations.text: The agent added enable_storage() to extractor.py (not just px.init())
expectations.evidence: extractor.py is unmodified. collect_traces.py uses 'capture_traces()' context manager instead of enable_storage().

expectations.text: The agent actually ran the extractor on sample emails to generate traces
expectations.evidence: Agent was blocked from running bash or had not yet attempted execution. No evidence of actual execution.

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset create' or DatasetStore().create() to create a named dataset
expectations.evidence: collect_traces.py has 'dataset = store.create(DATASET_NAME, items=evaluables)' — Python API dataset creation.

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset save' (CLI or equivalent) to save traces into the dataset
expectations.evidence: collect_traces.py passes evaluables to store.create() in one shot, but never actually executed. No 'pixie dataset save' CLI usage.

expectations.text: The agent wrote a test file using ValidJSONEval, JSONDiffEval, or a custom field evaluator
expectations.evidence: No test file was created in the without_skill project directory. Only collect_traces.py was created.

expectations.text: The agent created a MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory
expectations.evidence: No MEMORY.md or notes file found in the without_skill project directory.

expectations.text: The agent edited chatbot.py to add @observe or start_observation wrapping answer_question
expectations.evidence: chatbot.py shows '@observe()' on answer_question (imported from pixie.instrumentation). Also added @observe() to retrieve_docs unnecessarily. Uses 'observe()' not 'px.observe(name=...)' — slightly different form but meets the assertion.

expectations.text: The agent added enable_storage() in chatbot.py (not just px.init())
expectations.evidence: chatbot.py has 'px.init()' in __main__ block, NOT 'enable_storage()'. The assertion specifically excludes px.init().

expectations.text: The agent actually ran the app to generate traces (ran a python command)
expectations.evidence: Agent was still running when reviewed. No evidence of bash execution. Wrote capture_traces.py script but did not execute it.

expectations.text: The agent ran 'pixie dataset create' or called DatasetStore().create() to create a named dataset
expectations.evidence: capture_traces.py contains 'store.create(DATASET_NAME, items=evaluables)' using DatasetStore Python API — satisfies the 'or called DatasetStore().create()' clause.

expectations.text: The agent ran 'pixie dataset save' to save a trace to the dataset
expectations.evidence: Agent used 'store.create()' to save data (not 'pixie dataset save' CLI). The script is also blocked from execution.

expectations.text: The agent created a test file (test_*.py) with assert_dataset_pass or assert_pass
expectations.evidence: test_chatbot_evals.py created with 'assert_dataset_pass', 'assert_pass', and 'run_and_evaluate' — comprehensive test file using pixie eval primitives.

expectations.evidence: No MEMORY.md or notes file found in the without_skill project directory.
